name: Scripture Linker

releases.author: Marvive
releases.description:
# Scripture Linker v1.0.0: Initial Release

Welcome to the initial release of Scripture Linker! This plugin is designed to streamline your Bible study workflow within Obsidian by automatically detecting and linking Bible references.

## Key Features

- **Automatic Reference Detection**: Scans your notes for standard and abbreviated Bible references (e.g., John 3:16, Gen 1:1, 1 Cor 13).
- **Contextual Parsing**: Intelligent detection of shorthand references like (10:7) when a book context (like 1 Samuel) has already been established.
- **Multiple Translations**:
    - ESV, NASB95, NIV 2011, KJV 1900, NKJV, MSG, LSB, and LEB.
- **Dual Service Support**: Link your references to Logos Bible Software (ref.ly), Bolls Bible, or show both services side-by-side.
- **Ribbon & Command Support**: Quick access via a ribbon icon or dedicated commands to scan entire files or just selected text.
- **Smart Link Detection**: Automatically ignores references that are already part of existing markdown links to prevent duplication.

## Performance & Reliability

- **O(1) Book Lookups**: Optimized lookup maps for hundreds of book name abbreviations.
- **Regex Caching**: High-performance parsing logic with cached patterns.
- **Robust Test Suite**: 83 automated test cases covering parsing, URL generation, and edge cases.
- **Integrated CI**: Automated "Scan & Test" GitHub Actions bot to ensure code stability.

## Settings

- **Default Translation**: Set your preferred Bible version globally.
- **Link Service**: Choose between Logos, Bolls, or both.
- **Ribbon Toggle**: Option to hide the ribbon icon if you prefer a keyboard-only workflow.

## Support & Community

- **Branch Protection**: main branch is protected requiring PR reviews and automated checks.
- **Issue Templates**: Prepared templates for bug reports and feature requests.
- **Support Links**: Integrated GitHub Sponsor and Star buttons in the settings dashboard.

---
*Inspired by the Bible study workflow and built to make referencing effortless.*
releases.name: Initial Release
